title: TENT — Declarative Slice Spraying for Disaggregated LLM Serving
summary_zh: Mooncake Transfer Engine 的繼任者。將 transfer intent（來源/目的段）與 execution（跨 RDMA/NVLink/MNNVL/Ascend HIXL 的動態路徑選擇）解耦。將大型傳輸分解為 64 KB slices，透過 telemetry-driven 評分散佈到可用的 links 以消除 head-of-line blocking；自我修復時間 <50ms。vs Mooncake TE：1.36× throughput、26% 更低 P90 TTFT；RL 參數更新加速 20–26%。已部署於 1000-GPU 生產叢集。
summary_en: Successor to Mooncake Transfer Engine. Decouples transfer intent (source/destination segments) from execution (dynamic path selection across RDMA/NVLink/MNNVL/Ascend HIXL). Decomposes large transfers into 64 KB slices sprayed across available links via telemetry-driven scoring to eliminate head-of-line blocking; self-healing in <50ms. vs Mooncake TE: 1.36× throughput, 26% lower P90 TTFT; RL parameter updates accelerated by 20–26%. Deployed on 1000-GPU production cluster.
